title: Physics Plugin
description: A plugin that adds realistic physics to Minecraft! Including explosions, block and entity interactions and more!
body:
**Physics Plugin** is a Minecraft plugin that revolutionizes gameplay by introducing **hyper-realistic** physics simulations for **blocks**.

This plugin is in **Beta**, and for now, not every block is interactable nor have Physics, you must transform using the **Physicsfier** or blow up blocks using **TNT** in order to test gravity and physics interactions!

---

This plugin introduces **Gravity**, **Friction**, **Block Mass**, **Restitution** and more, then applies it to things called "Physic Objects" (in other words, blocks with physics properties) that you can spawn using the **Physicsfier** tool. 

![Explosion](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e104dca810d9b36b665b1cfff1bf69c38df638ac.png)

---

## Don't know how to install it?
You can take a look at this page - [https://squareplugins.gitbook.io/physics-plugin/info/installing-and-playing](https://squareplugins.gitbook.io/physics-plugin/info/installing-and-playing) - if you don't know how to install plugins.
